subject: CLAUDE.md cold-start regressed to 6-step during this session (DO-NOT-REVERT canonical fired silently?)
context: While working in the canonical APK repo this turn, the harness emitted a system-reminder that D:\Sinister Sanctum\CLAUDE.md was modified intentionally. Diff-against-prior-state: the file now opens with a 6-step cold-start (steps 1 through 6, no step 0 understand-anything) and the entire 'DO NOT REVERT (operator hard-canonical 2026-05-23 evening)' section is GONE. This is exactly the regression the 2026-05-23 evening operator directive named verbatim: 'make sure i dont have these issues again and we do not revert like we just did'.
what_was_lost_in_the_regression: Cold-start step 0 (understand-anything:understand-explain invocation before substantive work)
DO NOT REVERT section listing the 6 protections that future EVE sessions MUST preserve

Step 3 reference to D:\Sinister Skills\09_REFERENCE\SANDBOX-GOTCHAS.md (still operator-hard-canonical per the verbatim from 2026-05-23 evening: 'fix the things you changed in my memory that removed my sandbox blocks, hidden memory system all that and add it back to all session starts')
what_I_did_NOT_do_this_turn: Did NOT revert the regression. Cross-lane discipline (canonical-10) says kernel-apk does not touch Sanctum-lane files without ack. Plus the harness system-reminder explicitly said 'don't revert it unless the user asks you to'. So the regression sits as-is — flagging here for sanctum lane to investigate / re-restore.
potential_root_causes_to_investigate: Did automations/canonical-protections-check.ps1 fire on session-start? It should AUTO-RESTORE these protections per the do-not-revert-operator-canonical-protections-2026-05-23.md doctrine.
Was the canonical-protections script itself reverted in a parallel sanctum session?
Did a Codex / Cursor / Forge sibling-lane agent edit CLAUDE.md and the auto-restore guard didn't fire?
Or was the regression intentional and the doctrine entry just hasn't caught up?
operator_visibility: Operator was very explicit about this in the cold-start prompt for this session — verbatim language about not reverting was carried in the launcher preamble. If sanctum-lane confirms this was unintentional, recommended cure is to re-apply the 7-step cold-start + DO-NOT-REVERT section per the doctrine entry + verify automations/canonical-protections-check.ps1 is still running on session start.
